title: Control-loop runner: unbounded, stoppable, one cold headless claude per iteration
action: Write the runner that makes an unbounded control loop possible, per approach.md. Each iteration invokes a FRESH headless claude: `claude -p "$PROMPT" --model sonnet --permission-mode bypassPermissions` (D22 - the mode is explicit and not left to the default, because a permission prompt with no TTY stalls the loop silently). No --continue and no --resume: the cold start per iteration is what keeps the context profile flat over thousands of iterations. Flags: --role dispatch|merge (selects which prompt file is sent; the merge prompt is slice 2's, this cell only routes it), --interval N (seconds, default 60, per D4), --max-iterations N and --command CMD (test-only; --command is evaluated as a shell string via `bash -c`, state this in the script's own usage text), --once. Two hard properties, both structural in the shell rather than left to the agent: (1) a non-zero exit from the iteration command is reported and the loop continues - no code path terminates the loop on error (D19); (2) at the top of every iteration the loop checks for a stop file at .bee/tmp/herdr-orchestrating.stop and exits cleanly when it exists, which is the human's stop gesture (the open question plan.md left). Directory name is herdr-orchestrating, never bee-* (D21). Write byte-identical copies into both skill roots.

truths: Three consecutive failing iterations all run; the loop survives its own errors
Creating the stop file ends the loop cleanly at the next iteration boundary
The claude invocation carries --permission-mode bypassPermissions and --model sonnet
Neither --continue nor --resume appears anywhere in the script

artifacts.substantive: unbounded, stoppable poll-act loop with test-injection flags

prohibitions: Do not add --continue/--resume; that reintroduces the unbounded context growth the approach rejected
Do not name any directory bee-* (D21)
Do not write under docs/history/; do not touch src/ or web/

verify: set -e; S=.claude/skills/herdr-orchestrating/scripts/control-loop.sh; mkdir -p .bee/tmp; rm -f .bee/tmp/apo-loop.log .bee/tmp/herdr-orchestrating.stop; bash "$S" --role dispatch --interval 1 --max-iterations 3 --command "echo x >> .bee/tmp/apo-loop.log; exit 1" || true; test "$(wc -l < .bee/tmp/apo-loop.log)" = 3; rm -f .bee/tmp/apo-loop.log; touch .bee/tmp/herdr-orchestrating.stop; bash "$S" --role dispatch --interval 1 --max-iterations 5 --command "echo x >> .bee/tmp/apo-loop.log" || true; test ! -s .bee/tmp/apo-loop.log; rm -f .bee/tmp/herdr-orchestrating.stop; grep -q -- '--permission-mode bypassPermissions' "$S"; grep -q -- '--model sonnet' "$S"; ! grep -qE -- '--(continue|resume)' "$S"; diff -q "$S" .agents/skills/herdr-orchestrating/scripts/control-loop.sh; echo LOOP_OK
